summary: The implementation successfully addresses both requirements. REQ-1 (visual redesign) is fully implemented with improved spacing, typography, gradient backgrounds, hover effects, and visual hierarchy. REQ-2 (preview icons) is fully implemented with document type-specific icons (FileText, Image, File) positioned consistently within each document card.

hallucinated_features.description: Dynamic icon selection logic based on file type with support for multiple file extensions (pdf, doc, docx, txt, jpg, jpeg, png, gif)
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only specified that icons should 'visually represent the document type' but did not request a sophisticated file type detection function with support for multiple specific file extensions. The getDocumentIcon helper function goes beyond the minimal requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Hover state styling with border color change and shadow effects on document cards
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specified improved visual design but did not explicitly request interactive hover states. The implementation adds 'hover:border-teal-200 hover:shadow-sm transition-all duration-200' styling.

hallucinated_features.description: Enhanced button styling with hover effects (hover:bg-teal-50 hover:text-teal-700 hover:border-teal-300)
hallucinated_features.reason: The constraint explicitly stated to 'Keep the upload and scan button functionality intact' but did not request visual enhancements to these buttons. The implementation adds hover state styling beyond maintaining functionality.
